profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:40:59 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM07899Weston Milliken papers7899Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:06:24 UTC. >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Weston Milliken papers
Milliken, Weston
7899
17.4 cubic feet.
1990-2014 Weston Milliken is a philantropist. The Weston Milliken papers document Milliken's grantmaking, organizing and activism. <<<<<<< HEAD 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 ======= 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 13130538
Weston Miliken interview
Content Description
The Weston Milliken papers document Milliken's grantmaking, organizing and activism. His papers include MAP and NQAPIA reports and conference programs, grant material from Queer Youth Fund, Kicking Assets Fund, The Freeman Foundation and ADaM, articles and clippings, ephemera, The Personage newsletters, material on Creating Change and Funding Forward (National LGBTQ Task Force) and general material on LGBT.
Biographical / Historical
Weston Milliken is a philantropist.
General
Collecting program: Human Sexuality Collection.
Preferred Citation
Weston Milliken papers, #7899. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Conditions Governing Access
Access restricted to Tides correspondence with Queer Youth Fund in Box 1 (folders 1-4) until January 1, 2030.
Conditions Governing Access
Access restricted to Kicking Assets Fund material in Box 8 until December 31, 2024.
Philanthropy Gays. Milliken, Weston Queer Youth Fund Kicking Assets Fund Tides Foundation ADaM Movement Advancement Project National Queer Asian Pacific Islander Alliance National Gay and Lesbian Task Force (U.S.).--Creating Change Conference.

AdaM Grants
Scope and Contents
ADaM is a funding circle of Ralph Alpert (Santa Cruz), Mike Dively (Winter Park, FL) and Weston Milliken. We made a number of small and large grants over the years. This grew out of a men's group we participated in with others called ARF.AdaM documents2000114Grants summary1998-2020115Roundtable PFLAG/NYAC/GLSEN2000-01-2001-04116Public Interest Productions2001-04-2001-11117GLSEN1991-2001118Small grants2000-02119Small grant I - Harvard-Westlake20011110Small grant II - Fringe Benefits Theatre2000-20011111Small grant I - St. Mark's2000-20011112Small grant II - Yale - FLAGS2000-20011113Small grant I - WFM (Milliken) general correspondence20001114Small grant II - Ralph Alpert2000-20011115Small grant II - Mike Dively1999-20021116AdaM proposals20001117APICAP2002-20041118NYAC (National Youth Advisory Coalition) history2000-20011119-20Canada: Out is In20051121Dreams of Hope20051122Vermont Episcopal ELABL20051123Miscellaneous small grant prospects20051124LGBT Elders in America20041125Louisville Youth Group20041126Bemidji2004-20051127Other QYF prospects20041128NYAC20021129In the Life Youth-at-Risk20041130Small grants III20041131-32Gay-Straight Alliance Networks grant20091133Williams Institute Book Project20071134AdaM Grants2008-20091135FGLI (Funders for Lesbian and Gay Issues) multi-year grants20071136Astraea International20091137AdaM Grants20101138Astraea International2015-2017121Astraea International2017122Astraea International2018-06123Astraea International2019-05124Astraea International2020125Notes and miscellany1998-2020126Series V. The Parsonage, San Francisco
Scope and Contents
Newsletters 1983‐90, various minutes and correspondence, Parsonage Report on Commission on Liturgical Renewal ('84‐'85), Copy of SF Examiner "Gay In America" special section 1989. Also Hope & Help Center newsletters (H&H was an Espicopal SF AIDS ministry)Hope and Help Center newsletters1986-1987127The Parsonage News1983-1990128-14Parsonage Report on Commission on Liturgical Renewal1984-19851215The Parsonage documents and minutes1982-19861216-17The Parsonage documents and minutes1987-19881218The Parsonage documents and minutes1989-19901219Gay marriage1986-19891220Cromey/Swing/Marriage19881221JM May Article, etc.19881222Robert Williams firing1990-011223Liturgy committee19851224Parsonage miscellany1982-1988131Integrity: San Francisco Bay Area1986-1989132Integrity: National1988133Integrity national convention1989134Series VI. The Movement Advancement Project (MAP) and National Queer Asian Pacific Islander Alliance (NQAPIA)
Scope and Contents
The Movement Advancement Project (MAP) ‐ print outs of their public facing reports. I served on the MAP Board. National Queer Asian & Pacific Islander Alliance (NQAPIA) ‐ conference programs and misc. I supported them with personal grants.MAP reports2006-2007135MAP reports2008136MAP reports2009137MAP reports2010138MAP reports2011139MAP reports20121310MAP reports20131311-12MAP reports20141313MAP reports20151314MAP reports20161315-16MAP reports20171317MAP reports20181318MAP reports20191319MAP reports20201320NQAPIA leadership summit programs20171321-22NQAPIA leadership summit programs20131323NQAPIA leadership summit programs2018-20191324Series VII. AdaM Grants
Scope and Contents
ADaM is a funding circle of Ralph Alpert (Santa Cruz), Mike Dively (Winter Park, FL) and Weston Milliken. We made a number of small and large grants over the years.
